calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Apr-22-2024 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Nov-06-2023 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Feb-27-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Peter Bresler appeared by zoom for Conner Hopkins (petitioner).

The court stated that it thinks that with the declaration of the lost will it will be in a posture to open the estate. The court also informed Mr. Bresler that the attorney certification on the proof of subscribing witness needs to be signed asked him to do so and resubmit it. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Lost Will and for Letters Testamentary. The lost will dated August 23, 2019 is admitted to probate. Conner Garth Hopkins is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for April 22, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The appointed probate referee is to be determined.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Choi. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Dec-05-2022 Continued To Feb-27-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Peter Bresler, via Zoom, for Connor G. Hopkins, Petitioner.

The court acknowledges counsel's recent filing of the report regarding attempts to locate the original will. Counsel summarizes the investigation report. The court suggests that counsel consider other options such as filing a declaration in support of the presumption of revocation if the original will cannot be located. The court advises that it will grant a continuance but reminds counsel that this matter should be resolved soon.

The matter is continued to Feb-27-2023 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, Appointment Under IAEA

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Sep-26-2022 Continued To Oct-31-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Aug-08-2022 Continued To Sep-26-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Peter Bresler, via Zoom, for Connor G. Hopkins, Petitioner.

The court advises counsel that pursuant to what has been alleged so far, there is a presumption that the decedent intended to revoke her will and there has been no proof to refute that presumption. Counsel offers testimony in support of the presumption of revocation. The court disagrees with counsel and offers to continue the matter to allow him to file additional evidence to rebut the presumption of revocation.

The matter is continued to Sep-26-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Mar-07-2022 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Peter Bresler, via ZOOM, for Conner Hopkins, Petitioner.

Mr. Bresler reports that relatives have been searching for the original will and that a copy of the will may exist. The court advises that it is inclined to take this petition off calendar and that Mr. Bresler may file it again once it is ready to proceed. Mr. Bresler does not object to its tentative ruling.

The Petition for Probate of Will, etc., is off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: C. Gomez. Not reported.
